description: Generating videos using AI models such as Sora, Runway, Kling, or similar text-to-video and image-to-video tools
example_requests: generate a 10-second promotional video for a coffee shop
create a cinematic scene with a person walking in a forest
make a product demo video using Sora
generate a short clip for social media using Runway
create an animated intro for a YouTube channel

questions.question: What is the target duration of the video?
What aspect ratio and format is needed?
Should the video include background music (BGM)?
options: Yes — match the mood of the scene

questions.question: Are there actors or characters with spoken lines?
options: Actors present but no spoken lines

questions.question: What camera movement style is preferred?
What visual style should be used?
What lighting and time-of-day setting is preferred?
